name: The Eighth Loop
short_description: The Eighth Loop combines visual novel and platformer genres to bring you a unique experience. It has 1 platformer level that requires out of the box thinking to clear. The player needs to find out a way to escape out of a death loop.
detailed_description:
"As soon as I looked at this watch intently, it felt like the world stopped..."

Today's training is a bit dangerous. So, Eriza gives you a mysterious pocket watch.

The pocket watch is special. First, it's a memento of Eriza's grandmother. But what's even more interesting is it's ability to rewind time for it's owner.

The pocket watch can save you from lethal injury, But that's not all.

It hides an ability so powerful that can change your fate.

The Eighth Loop combines visual novel and platformer genres to bring you a unique experience.

It has 1 platformer level that requires out of the box thinking to clear and save the day.

The player needs to find out a way to escape out of a death loop which requires you to clear both the platformer and visual novel levels.

It is a short game that can be cleared in one sitting under an hour.
